hero.note: The LearningPlanet Festival returns in January 2027 for its 8th edition, celebrating the International Day of Education on 24 January. More details on the programme and opportunities to participate will be announced soon.

movement.heading: A global movement for transforming education
movement.statementPre: Since its launch in 2020 with UNESCO, the LearningPlanet Festival has been held each January, becoming a shared space for dialogue and action to reimagine learning in the 21st century, bringing together hundreds of thousands of participants from

curated.heading: A focused and curated 2027 edition
curated.codesignText: Interested in shaping a renewed, open Festival model from 2028 onwards?
curated.p1: In 2027, the LearningPlanet Festival will take place in a more focused and curated format, organised around selected online and in-person moments led by the Learning Planet Institute and co-designed with strategic partners.
curated.p2: The programme will focus on the six priority areas outlined above, with youth agency running as a cross-cutting theme throughout.
curated.p3: While there will not be an open call for events this year, we are beginning to explore what a renewed open and decentralised Festival model could look like from 2028 onwards. If you would like to be involved in this co-design process, please express your interest through this form. We will soon share a survey and further details on potential workshops from September onwards.

impact.countries: countries represented across the Festival community
impact.editions: editions celebrating the International Day of Education

replays.heading: Replays
replays.intro: Catch up on sessions from past editions on our YouTube channel.
replays.teaserText: Explore conversations from previous editions of the LearningPlanet Festival, free to watch anytime. Browse the full archive or dive into the 2026 highlights.
